title: Containers prune endpoint should use only prune filters
body:
Containers endpoints for HTTP compat and libpod APIs allowed usage of list HTTP
endpoint filter funcs. Documentation in case of libpod and compat API does not allow that.
This commit aligns code with the documentation.

Signed-off-by: Jakub Guzik <jakubmguzik@gmail.com>

/kind bug
<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]".  That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.
-->

This test is for bindings and checking filters that are not supposed to be working with the prune endpoint. I will try to adapt it.
